revision.comment: website by Iizuka Hiroaki (original article, not forked from Wikipedia)
revision.text:
{{Short description|Japanese-language wiki encyclopedia about Oomoto and Deguchi Onisaburō}} {{Infobox website | name = '''Onipedia''' | logo = | screenshot = | caption = | url = https://onipedia.info/ | commercial = No | type = Specialized online wiki encyclopedia | language = Japanese | owner = Iizuka Hiroaki (飯塚 弘明) | author = Iizuka Hiroaki | launch date = March 2019 | current status = Online }}
The '''{{nihongo|Onipedia|オニペディア}}''' is a Japanese-language, single-author online encyclopedia focused on {{nihongo|Deguchi Onisaburō|出口王仁三郎}} and his multi-volume scripture {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari''|霊界物語}}. The site describes itself as “an encyclopedia of Deguchi Onisaburō and ''Reikai Monogatari'',” edited and operated by writer–researcher {{nihongo|Iizuka Hiroaki|飯塚弘明}}. As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese)
[[Category:Wikis]]

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese)
[[Category:Wikis]] [[Category:Oomoto]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages November 4 2025]]

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese)

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese)

The site describes itself as “an encyclopedia of Deguchi Onisaburō and ''Reikai Monogatari'',” edited and operated by writer–researcher {{nihongo|Iizuka Hiroaki|飯塚弘明}}. As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese)

The '''{{nihongo|Onipedia|オニペディア}}''' is a Japanese-language, single-author online encyclopedia focused on {{nihongo|Deguchi Onisaburō|出口王仁三郎}} and his multi-volume scripture {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari''|霊界物語}}. The site describes itself as “an encyclopedia of Deguchi Onisaburō and ''Reikai Monogatari'',” edited and operated by writer–researcher {{nihongo|Iizuka Hiroaki|飯塚弘明}}. As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese)
[[Category:Wikis]] [[Category:Oomoto]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages November 4 2025]] {{wikidata link|Q136713849}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

The '''{{nihongo|Onipedia|オニペディア}}''' is a Japanese-language, single-author online encyclopedia focused on {{nihongo|Deguchi Onisaburō|出口王仁三郎}} and his multi-volume scripture {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari''|霊界物語}}. The site describes itself as “an encyclopedia of Deguchi Onisaburō and ''Reikai Monogatari'',” edited and operated by writer–researcher {{nihongo|Iizuka Hiroaki|飯塚弘明}}. As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>

Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>

==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>

The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese) {{wikidata link|Q136713849}} [[Category:Oomoto]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages November 4 2025]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikis]]

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==See also== *[[Ōmoto]] *[[Onisaburo Deguchi]] *[[Reikai Monogatari]] *[[Tenrikyo Resource Wiki]]
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== *[https://onipedia.info/ Onipedia] (official website in Japanese) {{wikidata link|Q136713849}} [[Category:Oomoto]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikis]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

As of June 29, 2025, it listed 3,815 articles and 1,511 images.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ (Onipedia) |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=June 29, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Overview== Onipedia’s scope centers on Deguchi Onisaburō, the {{nihongo|Ōmoto|大本}} movement, and topics, places, and figures appearing in ''Reikai Monogatari''. Navigation emphasizes category trees such as “''Reikai Monogatari''," “Deguchi Onisaburō,” and “Ōmoto,” along with lists for people, places, shrines, temples, inscriptions, and maps.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖主なカテゴリ〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> Articles are written in modern Japanese orthography with editorial notes about character variants and reading conventions.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ: 〖使用上の注意〗 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==History== According to the editor’s biography, Onipedia was launched in March 2019 as an encyclopedic resource complementing his earlier reading site and database projects.<ref>{{cite web |title=飯塚弘明（略歴） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%A3%AF%E5%A1%9A%E5%BC%98%E6%98%8E |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The homepage describes the project as a long-term work in progress with a target of roughly 20,000 entries and an internal “completion date” set for March 3, 2033 (Reiwa 15).<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Content and features== Onipedia provides short encyclopedia articles on proper names and terms—e.g., entries for places that appear in ''Reikai Monogatari'' and biographical sketches of associated figures—often linking to digitized sources and imagery.<ref>{{cite web |title=キールの里 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%82%AD%E3%83%BC%E3%83%AB%E3%81%AE%E9%87%8C |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 9, 2024 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=出口王仁三郎の写真 |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E5%87%BA%E5%8F%A3%E7%8E%8B%E4%BB%81%E4%B8%89%E9%83%8E%E3%81%AE%E5%86%99%E7%9C%9F |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=March 15, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> The site runs on MediaWiki software (indicated in page footers) and displays a Creative Commons “Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike” license notice by default.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（フッター表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Editorial model== Unlike Wikipedia, Onipedia is not a publicly editable wiki. The site states that “articles are written by Iizuka Hiroaki; unlike Wikipedia, anyone cannot write/edit,” and invites readers to submit corrections or sources via a form or email.<ref>{{cite web |title=使用上の注意（「誰でも書くことは出来ません」項） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref> A separate “About Onipedia” page confirms that all text is authored and administered by Iizuka and explains the site’s reproduction policy.<ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Related projects== Onipedia is one of three interlinked sites run by Iizuka: {{nihongo|''Reikai Monogatari Net''|霊界物語ネット}} (a reading library of public-domain or permissioned Ōmoto texts) and {{nihongo|Ōni DB|王仁ＤＢ}} (a search database). The three are presented respectively as “read,” “search,” and “learn (encyclopedia).”<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（関連サイト案内） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=王仁ＤＢ トップ |url=https://onidb.info/ |website=王仁ＤＢ |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（案内ページ） |url=https://reikaimonogatari.net/ |website=霊界物語ネット |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=霊界物語ネット（解説項目） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E9%9C%8A%E7%95%8C%E7%89%A9%E8%AA%9E%E3%83%8D%E3%83%83%E3%83%88 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
==Licensing== Page footers indicate that, unless otherwise noted, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike license; the “About” page additionally clarifies that textual copyright is held by Iizuka and may be reproduced with attribution.<ref>{{cite web |title=メインページ（ライセンス表記） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/%E3%83%A1%E3%82%A4%E3%83%B3%E3%83%9A%E3%83%BC%E3%82%B8 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |title=Onipedia: Onipediaについて（文章の著作権） |url=https://onipedia.info/wiki/Onipedia%3AOnipedia%E3%81%AB%E3%81%A4%E3%81%84%E3%81%A6 |website=Onipedia |language=ja |date=April 4, 2025 |access-date=August 17, 2025}}</ref>
